creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Yuri Pankov from comment #1)
The idea is to ensure that syscalls detect what would otherwise be truncation bugs that may or may not be detected depending on how the paths are used.  See the discussion in D16518.

I will probably just revert that portion of r337468, though, as I would very much like to get this fixed in 12.0.
